clauses.original:
Demo Legal Contract – Software Service Agreement 
SOFTWARE SERVICE AGREEMENT 
This Software Service Agreement (“Agreement”) is entered into on this day between ABC 
Solutions, hereinafter referred to as the “Service Provider”, and XYZ Pvt. Ltd., hereinafter 
referred to as the “Client”.
clauses.simplified: ABC Solutions (the service provider) and XYZ Pvt. Ltd. (the client) are entering into this agreement. This agreement is for the software services that ABC Solutions will provide to XYZ Pvt. Ltd. It starts on the date it is signed.

clauses.original:
This Agreement sets forth the terms and conditio ns under which 
the Service Provider agrees to provide software development and related services to the 
Client.
clauses.simplified: This agreement outlines the terms under which we will provide software development services to you.

clauses.original:
The Service Provider agrees to design, develop, and maintain software applications as 
requested by the Client.
clauses.simplified: The Service Provider will create and look after software programs according to the Client's needs.

clauses.original:
The services shall be performed in a professional manner and in 
accordance with the specifications and timelines mutually agreed upon by both par ties.
clauses.simplified: We will do the work in a professional way, following the details and deadlines that we both agree on.

clauses.original:
The Service Provider shall ensure that all deliverables meet the quality standards specified 
in the project documentation and shall provide regular updates regarding the progress of 
the work.
clauses.simplified: The Service Provider must deliver high-quality work that meets the project's standards and keep us updated on their progress. They will make sure their work is good enough and let us know how things are going.

clauses.original:
The Client agrees to compensate the Service Provider for the services rendered under this 
Agreement.
clauses.simplified: The Client must pay the Service Provider for the work they do under this agreement.

clauses.original:
The total fee for the services shall be mutually agreed upon prior to the 
commencement of the project.
clauses.simplified: We will agree on the total cost of the services before the project starts.

clauses.original:
The Client shall make an initial payment before the start of 
the project and the remaining balance shall be paid upon completion and delivery of the 
final product.
clauses.simplified: You must pay us an initial amount before we start the project, and the rest when we finish and deliver the final product.

clauses.original:
Any delay in payment beyond the agreed due date may result in additional 
charges or suspension of services until payment is received.
clauses.simplified: If you don't pay on time, you may be charged extra or we'll stop providing services until we get your payment.

clauses.original:
Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality regarding any proprietary or sensitive 
information shared during the course of this Agreement.
clauses.simplified: Both parties must keep secret any private or sensitive information they share with each other.

clauses.original:
Such confidential information 
shall not be disclosed to any third party without prior written consent from the other party 
unless required by law.
clauses.simplified: You must not share confidential information with anyone else without getting permission in writing first, unless the law says you have to.

clauses.original:
This confidentiality obligation shall continue even after the 
termination of this Agreement.
clauses.simplified: You must keep the information confidential even after this agreement ends.

clauses.original:
This Agreement shall commence on the effective date and shall remain in force until the 
completion of the services unless terminated earlier by either party.
clauses.simplified: This agreement starts on the effective date and lasts until the work is finished, unless one of the parties ends it sooner.

clauses.original:
Either party may 
terminate this Agreement by providing written notice to the other party at least thirty days in 
advance.
clauses.simplified: Either side can end this agreement by giving the other side a written warning at least 30 days before it happens.

clauses.original:
However, the Client reserves the right to terminate the Agreement immediately if 
the Service Provider fails to deliver the services as per the agreed specifications or 
timelines.
clauses.simplified: The Client can end the Agreement at any time if the Service Provider doesn't meet the agreed requirements or deadlines. This means the Client can stop the agreement immediately if the Service Provider fails to deliver as promised.

clauses.original:
The Service Provider shall not be held liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential 
damages arising from the use of the software or services provided under this Agreement.
clauses.simplified: We are not responsible for any indirect losses or damages that result from using our software or services. This includes any unexpected problems or extra costs that may occur.

clauses.original: The Service Provider’s total liability under this Agreement shall not excee d
clauses.simplified: The Service Provider is not responsible for more than a certain amount of damages under this agreement.

clauses.original:
the total amount 
paid by the Client for the services.
clauses.simplified: The total amount the Client pays for the services.

clauses.original:
All intellectual property rights related to the software developed during the course of this 
project shall be transferred to the Client upon full and final payment for the services.
clauses.simplified: The Client will own all rights to the software created during the project once they have paid for all services in full.

clauses.original:
Until 
such payment is completed, the Service Provider shall retain ownersh ip of the developed 
materials.
clauses.simplified: The Service Provider owns the developed materials until they are fully paid for.

clauses.original:
In the event of any dispute arising out of or in connection with this Agreement, both parties 
agree to attempt to resolve the dispute through mutual discussion and negotiation.
clauses.simplified: If a problem comes up related to this Agreement, we'll try to resolve it by talking and negotiating with each other. We'll work together to find a solution before taking any further action.

clauses.original:
If the 
dispute cannot be resolved amicably, it shall be referred to arbitration in accordance with 
the applicable laws of the jurisdiction.
clauses.simplified: If we can't agree on a solution, the issue will be settled by an independent arbitrator according to the laws of the area.

clauses.original:
This Agreement shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the 
applicable jurisdiction.
clauses.simplified: This agreement will be guided and explained by the laws of the area where it applies.

clauses.original:
By signing this Agreement, both parties acknowledge that they have 
read, understood, and agreed to the terms and conditions set forth in this do cument.
clauses.simplified: By signing this agreement, both parties confirm they've read and accepted the terms outlined in this document.

summary: This Software Service Agreement is a contract between ABC Solutions and XYZ Pvt. Ltd. that outlines the terms for software development and related services, with the service provider agreeing to design, develop, and maintain software applications as requested by the client. The client must compensate the service provider for the services rendered, with payment terms and timelines mutually agreed upon, and both parties must maintain confidentiality regarding proprietary information shared during the agreement. The agreement can be terminated by either party with written notice, but the service provider is not liable for indirect damages and their total liability is limited to the amount paid by the client.
